benefits_headline: Still Cleaning Your Toilet the Hard Way?
benefits_paragraphs: Tired of scrubbing and scrubbing with no results? FizzClean's fast-acting foaming powder cuts through the toughest stains in just 20 minutes.
The best part? It leaves your toilet hygienically clean every time without you lifting a finger. No more back-breaking work, no more harsh chemicals.
FizzClean doesn't stop at toilets. This versatile cleaning powerhouse works wonders throughout your home. Use it as a scouring paste for bathtubs, sinks, tiles, countertops, and garbage disposals.
urgency_text: 70% OFF for a limited time — don't miss out!

science_headline: 3 Easy Steps to a Sparkling Clean Toilet
science_subheadline: Quickly Restore Your Toilet to Like-New Cleanliness

science_steps.text: Scoop 1 tablespoon of FizzClean powder and pour it into the toilet bowl. Couldn't be simpler.
Let the powerful foam expand and dissolve tough stains, dirt, and grime in just 20 minutes.
Simply flush your toilet, and that's it. FizzClean has already done all the dirty work for you!

science_result: Never touch your toilet again — Spotless cleanliness in just 20 minutes!
reviews_headline: Let the Results Speak for Themselves
reviews_subheadline: See Why FizzClean Is the Go-To Solution for a Sparkling Clean Toilet

reviews.body: I used to spend AGES scrubbing my toilet like sometimes even half a day only to see the same old stubborn stains still there. But it's so much easier with FizzClean when it takes care of everything just like that!
reviews.name: Lisa M.

reviews.body: I was so embarrassed by the limescale and rust stains in my toilet. And no matter how many supposedly good products I tried, nothing worked. Nothing. But after just one use of FizzClean, the stains were completely gone!
reviews.name: Mark T.

reviews.body: Cleaning my toilet was always the chore I dreaded the most. Scrubbing for hours, the strong chemical smells, my knees hurting by the end. FizzClean changed everything though! Takes 20 minutes tops and my toilet is cleaner than ever!
reviews.name: Emily R.

faq_headline: Everything You Need to Know About FizzClean

faq_items.question: Is FizzClean safe for septic tanks?
faq_items.answer: Absolutely! FizzClean is 100% septic tank safe and gentle on your plumbing system. You can use it with complete peace of mind.

faq_items.question: Does FizzClean contain bleach?
faq_items.answer: No, FizzClean is completely bleach-free. It's made with non-toxic, family-safe ingredients that are tough on stains but gentle on your health.

faq_items.question: How often should I use FizzClean?
faq_items.answer: For best results, use FizzClean once a week to maintain a spotless and hygienic toilet. Regular use helps prevent the buildup of stains and bacteria.

faq_items.question: What else can I use FizzClean on?
faq_items.answer: FizzClean isn't just for toilets! It works wonders on bathtubs, sinks, garbage disposals, tiles, and countertops. Simply mix the powder with water to create a powerful paste for other surfaces.

faq_items.question: Does FizzClean have a scent?
faq_items.answer: Yes, FizzClean leaves behind a refreshing Ocean Fresh scent, ensuring your bathroom smells as clean as it looks.

faq_items.question: How long does it take to work?
faq_items.answer: FizzClean delivers deep-cleaning results in just 20 minutes. Simply pour, wait, and flush for a spotless toilet without any scrubbing.

footer_description: FizzClean is America's #1 rated toilet cleaner. Our powerful foaming powder dissolves tough stains, eliminates odors, and sanitizes your toilet — all without scrubbing. Made with non-toxic, family-safe ingredients.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This Privacy Policy describes how FizzClean and its authorized distributors collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect personal information that you provide directly to us when you place an order, create an account, or contact customer support. This includes your name, email address, shipping address, billing address, phone number, and payment information.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to process and fulfill your orders, provide customer support, send order confirmations and shipping updates, and improve our website and services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze website traffic. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@get-fizzclean.com.

modals.title: Terms of Service
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. By accessing this website and purchasing any products, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: Product Disclaimer
sections.content: FizzClean is a cleaning product designed for household use. Follow all instructions on the product label. Results may vary based on individual circumstances.

sections.heading: Order Acceptance
sections.content: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason. All prices are subject to change without notice.

sections.heading: Shipping
sections.content: Shipping times are estimates only and do not guarantee delivery by a specific date. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the shipping carrier.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties. In no event shall our liability exceed the purchase price paid for the product.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms, please contact us at support@get-fizzclean.com.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds
modals.intro: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all FizzClean orders.

sections.heading: 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.content: If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return the product(s) within 30 days from the date of delivery for a full refund. No questions asked.

sections.heading: How to Initiate a Refund
sections.content: To request a refund, please contact our customer support team at support@get-fizzclean.com with your order number. Our support team will respond within 1-2 business days with return instructions.

sections.heading: Refund Processing
sections.content: Refunds are typically processed within 5-10 business days after we receive your returned product. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For returns and refund requests, please contact support@get-fizzclean.com.

modals.title: Contact Us
modals.intro: We value our customers and are here to help with any questions or concerns.
